key_signals: Bull trend stack remains intact: 15m/4h/1d EMA regime is bull, and price 2118.4 is above 7d AVWAP 2069.64, 4h RVWAP 2113.2881680688824, and 1d RVWAP 2091.816634284271.

Structure is pressing resistance: 4h TPO value is 2110.68-2122.96 with POC 2115.97, daily TPO VAH 2112.18 has been reclaimed, but bearish absorption at 2120.04, buying exhaustion at 2118.49, hidden bearish divergence into 10:13, and the 2125.11 ask wall warn of local stalling.

Dip support is still defined by bullish absorption at 2113.13-2113.65, selling exhaustion at 2107.21, and the 2112.62 bid wall; VPIN 0.6577896 is high-toxicity and argues for caution rather than a confirmed bearish regime shift.
